name: Artichoke Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the liquid from one jar of artichokes into a saucepan.
2. Drain the liquid from the second jar and discard it.
3. Finely chop all the artichokes; set aside.
4. Grease an 12-inch or 8-inch baking dish.
5. In the saucepan, cook the minced onion over medium heat until tender.
6. In a medium bowl, beat the eggs until blended.
7. Stir in the cooked onion, chopped artichokes, mozzarella cheese, bread crumbs, parsley, salt, and pepper.
8. Spread the mixture evenly in the baking dish.
9. If not baking immediately, cover and refrigerate for about 1 hour before serving.
10. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
11. Bake the artichoke mixture for 30 to 35 minutes until set and lightly browned.
12. Cool for 15 minutes on a wire rack.
13. Cut the squares lengthwise into 4 strips, then cut each strip crosswise into 6 pieces.
14. Arrange the appetizers on a platter; garnish with flowers and serve.
Makes 24 hors d'oeuvres.
